ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" INTEGER /* Type of the device (e.g., GPS, RC) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the device was added to the CMS */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the device details were last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, retired) */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type FOREIGN KEY ("device_type") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the parameter */,
  "increment" REAL /* Incremental step for the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the parameter */,
  "reboot_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if a reboot is required after changing the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter (e.g., INT32, FLOAT) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was added to the CMS */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the parameter details were last updated */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule for the parameter */,
  "dependency" TEXT /* Dependencies between parameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter value */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "set_date" TEXT /* Date when the value was set */,
  "set_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the value */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for setting the value */,
  "validated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the value has been validated */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass, fail, warning) */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made to the parameter value (e.g., update, insert, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_set_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, admin, developer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was added to the CMS */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user details were last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter that was changed */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the parameter belongs to */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the parameter */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the parameter */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made to the parameter (e.g., update, insert, delete) */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass, fail, warning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the device type was added to the CMS */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the device type details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device model */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the model belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the device model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the device model was added to the CMS */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the device model details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_models_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
